t5_Summary: this new Kindle is awesome for reading only, and is lightweight with extremely long battery life . the battery is rated to last 6-8 weeks on average between the various tech sites, which trumps my ipad mini by several life cycles . it has nice features, such as dictionary, where you can quickly check unfamiliar words while reading, create notes, or write and read reviews .

my favorite part is being able to request any type of music I'm in the mood for, and even change my mind a few minutes later . the sound from it is a very nice quality and I love asking Alexa to turn on the lights, play music, what the weather is like, etc . amazon customer received one of the initial offers to purchase the Echo before it was available to the general public for a low price of $100 .

amazon fire TV's work fantastically and we decided to stop paying for cable . I had also purchased a class 10 64 GB micro SD card for the Amazon Fire TV Box as well . the fire box is 4K compatible providing a great picture with my 4K and non-4K TVs, no noticeable lag time with transition between channels or other options .

amazonBasics products are great for middle income families like ours . they are a good value than buying Energizer or Duracell batteries online . a lot of them are similar, including these, and they make the most sense price wise . the batteries have the same shelf life as competing brands . it is not unusual for knockoffs to lead acid into your equipment or device, and even to explode!
